scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w client run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.service:install: npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env && pm2 save && node scripts/boot-hint.mjs
scripts.service:restart: npm run build && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env
scripts.typecheck: npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w server run test && npm -w client run test
